description: Pilot — temptation; Jesus in wilderness, devil addresses Him
mustContain: He ate nothing in those days. Afterward, when they were completed, He was hungry.
The devil said to Him, “If you are the Son of God, command this stone to become bread.”
Jesus answered him, “Get behind me, Satan!
mustNotContain: he ate nothing in those days. Afterward, when they were completed, he was hungry.
Jesus answered Him, “Get behind me, Satan!
